content: agent1: implementing lock_files param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will add _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file methods. Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent1: I've already added lock_files to Editor.__init__ (src/click/_termui_impl.py) and to termui.edit(). Editor.__init__ now has params: editor, env, require_save, extension, lock_files=False. I added helper methods _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file/_lock_file right after __init__, and wrapped the subprocess.Popen call in edit_file() with 'with self._lock_file(filename):'. Please add monitor_process as an additional kwarg (append after lock_files) rather than rewriting those blocks, so we don't clobber each other. I'm about to run the test suite - will ping when done.
